options.description: Toggle functionalities. (1) --disable-network. Disable uploading the file network.
Don't upload and dump to stdin.
Specify enviornment variables to be included with this build. (1) CODECOV_ENV=VAR1,VAR2. (2) -e VAR1 VAR2.

Toggle functionalites.
Use -X s3 to disable the default uploader.

Target file(s) to upload.
(1) -f "path/to/file". Only upload this file.
(2) -f "path/to/file1" "path/to/file2". Only upload these files.
NOTE: Make sure to double quote paths if they contain spaces!

Flag the upload to group coverage metrics. (1) --flag unittests. This upload is only unittests. (2) --flag integration. This upload is only integration tests. (3) --flag ut,chrome. This upload is chrome - UI tests.
Custom defined name of the upload. Visible in Codecov UI.
Exit with 1 if not successful. Default will Exit with 0.
Used when not in git/hg project to identify project root directory.
owner/repo slug used instead of the private repo token in Enterprise. (option) Set environment variable CODECOV_SLUG=:owner/:repo.
Set the private repository token. (option) set the enviornment variable CODECOV_TOKEN=:uuid. (1) -t uuid.
Set the target url for Enterprise customers. (option) Set environment variable CODECOV_URL=https://my-hosted-codecov.com.
